summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: WhatsApp Templates CRUD, Meetings Calendar, and Reminders page. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/templates - Returns 8 seeded templates
Backend: GET /api/templates - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/templates - Admin can create template
Backend: POST /api/templates - Team member gets 403
Backend: PUT /api/templates/{id} - Admin can edit template
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} - Admin can delete template
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} - Team member gets 403
Backend: GET /api/calendar?month=M&year=YYYY - Returns events for month
Backend: GET /api/calendar?month=4&year=2026 - Returns events for April 2026
Backend: GET /api/calendar - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/calendar - Validates month range (422 for invalid)
Backend: GET /api/reminders - Returns overdue/today/tomorrow/thisWeek arrays with counts
Backend: GET /api/reminders - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/reminders - Leads have correct structure
Backend: Team member can view templates (read-only)
Backend: Team member can view calendar
Backend: Team member can view reminders
Frontend: WhatsApp Templates page loads at /weekly-messages with data-testid='templates-page'
Frontend: Templates grouped by category (First Contact, Follow-up, Meeting, Onboarding, Sales)
Frontend: Template filter dropdown works
Frontend: New Template button visible for admin only
Frontend: New Template dialog opens with name, category, message inputs
Frontend: Placeholder buttons ({company}, {team}, {date}, {city}, {link}) visible in dialog
Frontend: Copy and Send buttons visible on each template card
Frontend: Edit and Delete buttons visible for admin only
Frontend: Team member sees only Copy/Send buttons (no Edit/Delete)
Frontend: Calendar page loads at /calendar with data-testid='calendar-page'
Frontend: Calendar shows monthly grid with day headers
Frontend: Calendar prev/next month navigation works
Frontend: Calendar month label updates correctly
Frontend: Calendar day cells show follow-up/meeting badges
Frontend: Clicking day with events shows event details in side panel
Frontend: Clicking event in side panel navigates to lead detail
Frontend: Reminders page loads at /reminders with data-testid='reminders-page'
Frontend: Reminders shows 4 count cards (overdue, today, tomorrow, thisWeek)
Frontend: Reminder leads are clickable and navigate to lead detail
test_credentials: Admin: admin@wedus.com / admin123, Team: priya@wedus.com / team123
seed_data_creation: 8 default WhatsApp templates seeded on startup. Test lead created and deleted for calendar testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features fully tested: (1) WhatsApp Templates at /weekly-messages - CRUD for admin, read-only for team. data-testids: templates-page, template-filter, add-template-btn, template-name-input, template-message-input, save-template-btn, template-card-{id}, copy-template-{id}, send-template-{id}, edit-template-{id}, delete-template-{id}. (2) Calendar at /calendar - monthly grid with events. data-testids: calendar-page, cal-prev, cal-next, cal-month-label, cal-day-{n}, cal-event-{id}. (3) Reminders at /reminders - shows overdue/today/tomorrow/thisWeek follow-ups. data-testids: reminders-page, reminder-count-{key}, reminder-lead-{id}. Sidebar nav items: nav-meetings-calendar, nav-reminders, nav-weekly-msgs.
